title: SeasonalSurvival
description: A mod for Minecraft that adds a seasonal aspect to the survival mode which may drive player creativity in harsh or abnormal conditions
body: The SeasonalSurvival mod is for players who want to spice up their game slightly, by adding a seasonal aspect to their survival experience. Prepare in the first 10 days in order to more easily survive your first season (winter) (think about heat and light). The mod is server-side, but can both be played in singleplayer or on a dedicated multiplayer server. This mod was inspired by recent videos that highlighted the need for Minecraft to have a inner effect by bringing in a nagging need that leads to more creativity. Pre-existing singleplayer worlds are not affected by this mod, as a checkbox needs to be clicked on the world creation screen in order to have access to this new type of challenge.
